message.content:
@startuml
actor Caller
participant ":RoomTransactionService" as RTS
participant ":RoomTransactionCommand" as RTC
participant ":Nats Streaming" as NS

Caller -> RTS: Create(context, payload)
activate RTS
RTS -> RTS: Validate()
alt "Data Not Valid"
    RTS --> Caller: UnprocessableEntity
else
    loop "For each shift"
        RTS -> RTS: rt := RoomTransactionModel()
        RTS -> RTC: Create(context, rt)
        activate RTC
        RTC --> RTS: uuid
        deactivate RTC
    end
    RTS -> NS: publishTransactionCreated(context, []uuid)
    activate NS
    NS --> RTS: published
    deactivate NS
    RTS --> Caller: created
end
deactivate RTS
@enduml
